sources.name: NCERT Textbooks
sources.strategy: Find chapter-wise school-level fundamentals before advanced notes

sources.name: Open educational references
sources.strategy: Search for topic summary, timelines, and concept explainers from reputable educational domains

sources.name: Legislative and constitutional references
sources.strategy: Use official legal and parliamentary sources for constitutional topics

sources.name: Policy explainers
sources.strategy: Search for policy background articles with clear definitions and examples

sources.name: Government and scientific portals
sources.strategy: Use official environment and geography datasets for factual grounding

sources.name: Concept explainers
sources.strategy: Search for visual and map-based explanations where possible

globalSources.name: Topic bootstrap
globalSources.strategy: Search '<topic> beginner guide + exam prep' and prioritize structured educational sources
